name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title pledge loans and flex lines of credit secured by your vehicle, accepting most credit types at their Memphis Summer Avenue location since 2007.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States. The Summer Avenue Memphis location has been operating since February 2007, situated one mile west of Highland Street across from Auto Zone. The store serves the broader Memphis metropolitan area and offers bilingual services to accommodate Spanish-speaking customers.

This location offers three distinct products. The title pledge is a secured loan using your vehicle title as collateral — you retain use of the vehicle while the loan is active. The flex line of credit is also vehicle-secured but operates as a revolving credit line, allowing customers to draw funds up to their credit limit all at once or incrementally over time. A third option, the unsecured flexible line of credit, is available both in-store and online and requires no vehicle collateral — only a government-issued ID, a recent bank statement, and proof of income if recurring deposits are not visible on the statement. Online applications for the unsecured product are restricted to residents of AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI.

The store distinguishes itself locally with bilingual staff, extended weekday hours (open until 7pm on Mondays and Fridays), and a strong customer service track record evidenced by a 5.00/5 average rating across more than 481 Google reviews. Staff members mentioned repeatedly by name in reviews include Nicole and Joyce. TitleMax does perform a credit check for all products, but positions its vehicle-secured options as accessible to most credit types since the title mitigates lender risk.

Honestly, title loans and secured lines of credit are among the highest-cost credit products available to consumers. While TitleMax advertises 'competitive rates,' this is relative to other title lenders — not to banks, credit unions, or personal loan lenders. Borrowers who default risk vehicle repossession. The unsecured line of credit offers a safer alternative for those who qualify, but all products are intended as short-term emergency solutions and should not be used for long-term borrowing. Consumers with any access to lower-cost alternatives should exhaust those options first.
pros: Same-day cash approval and disbursement for title pledge and flex LOC products
Most credit types accepted — vehicle title can offset poor credit history
Keep driving your vehicle throughout the loan term
Bilingual staff available at this Memphis location
5.00/5 average rating from 481+ Google reviews with consistent staff praise
Three distinct product types covering secured and unsecured borrowing needs
Extended hours Monday and Friday until 7pm; open Saturdays until 4pm
cons: Title pledge and flex LOC products put your vehicle at risk of repossession if you default
Requires a clear, lien-free vehicle title — borrowers still making car payments do not qualify for title products
Online unsecured line of credit restricted to only 11 states; not available to all customers
Closed Sundays, limiting access for weekend emergencies
Title loans are high-cost credit products; 'competitive rates' means competitive with other title lenders, not mainstream lenders
best_for: Memphis-area residents who need same-day emergency cash and own their vehicle outright
Borrowers with poor or damaged credit who have been declined by banks and credit unions
Customers needing a revolving emergency credit line rather than a one-time lump-sum loan
Spanish-speaking borrowers who need bilingual loan assistance
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for Memphis residents who own their vehicle free and clear, need cash the same day, and cannot qualify for lower-cost alternatives due to poor credit. The central caveat is that vehicle-secured title loans carry high interest rates and risk repossession upon default — they should be treated as a last resort, not a routine borrowing tool.
services: Secured flex line of credit (vehicle-collateralized revolving credit)
In-store unsecured personal line of credit
Online unsecured personal line of credit (select states)
Credit check with vehicle collateral consideration
Incremental or lump-sum draws against line of credit
Online application portal for personal lines of credit
Vehicle value assessment for loan sizing
